name: Fear Response
author: Poki
description: Get ready to get spooked in Fear Response! In this 3D Horror game, you play as Harry - an agent for the Fear Response Team. It's up to you to investigate the ruins of an old mansion and unravel the mystery that surrounds the former owners. What happened to the happy couple and their baby Cheryl? And what stalks the halls of the manor to this day? Find out as you solve puzzles, creep through the mansions hallways and make your way to the exit. Can you escape the mansion with your life? How to play Fear Response? Use WASD buttons or the arrows keys to move! Use the mouse to interact! Who created Fear Response? Fear Response was created by No Pressure Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Crazy Cars , Stickman Climb! and Stickman Climb 2 How can I play Fear Response for free? You can play Fear Response for free on Poki. Can I play Fear Response on mobile devices and desktop? Fear Response can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
